description: In this course we'll going to talk about tech jobs in ai

reviews.name: Sara Ahmadi
reviews.text: Sara spoke with real confidence today and led part of the conversation about remote teams. Her vocabulary around workflows has grown a lot — just keep an eye on past-tense endings.

reviews.name: Mohammad Rezaei
reviews.text: Great energy and very willing to take risks with new phrases. Worked hard on linking words like "however" and "on the other hand". Next step: slowing down for clearer pronunciation.

reviews.name: Niloofar Karimi
reviews.text: Excellent contribution — she challenged ideas politely and used advanced expressions naturally. A real model for the group during the AI-jobs debate.

reviews.name: Reza Tehrani
reviews.text: Much more fluent than last session and great use of examples from his own job. We will keep practising question forms so he can drive discussions even more.
